remarks: Built by Jiangsu New Yangzi Shipbuilding Co., Ltd.
Built in 2015 and delivered in Jan 2017.
Main engine: MAN B&W 6S60ME-C8.2 Tier II (DALIAN MARINE DIESEL CO.,LTD).
Assessment report only; actual scope remains subject to onboard confirmation.

service_items.title: HCU system overhaul
service_items.description: 64k running hours overhaul scope for HCU on MAN B&W 6S60ME-C8.2.
work_scope: Overhaul ELFI valve and multiway valve units.
Overhaul exhaust valve actuator and fuel oil pressure booster.
Overhaul accumulators and refill with nitrogen.
Carry out maintenance and overhauling of HPS.

service_items.title: MPC system inspection
service_items.description: 64k running hours inspection scope for MPC on MAN B&W 6S60ME-C8.2.
work_scope: Inspect MPC operating condition and verify inspection findings.
Replace related consumable parts if required after confirmation.

spare_parts_items.title: Fuel booster units top covers and suction valves

risks: Shipyard cross-operation may delay schedule and restrict working window.
Waiting for spare parts may interrupt or delay execution.
Safety approvals or hot work restrictions may affect site arrangement and schedule.
pending_items: Confirm HPS/HCU accumulators repair kit scope and quantities.
Confirm FIVA valves pilot valves supply responsibility.
Confirm fuel booster unit components supply responsibility.
Confirm MPC and UPS batteries supply responsibility.
Confirm whether spare parts are owner supply or company supply.
Confirm China South/Central port working window and cross-operation arrangement.
Confirm hot work permit, confined space permit, and high-pressure safety procedure.
assumptions: Assessment values are for quotation preparation only.
Actual execution scope may be adjusted according to onboard condition.
Final spare parts inclusion depends on customer confirmation.
